text: How can a Search and Rescue Radar Transponder (SART) effective range be maximized?

options.text: The SART should be placed in water immediately after activation
The SART should be put on high power mode
Mount the SART horizontally with respect to rescue vessel radar
It should be as high as possible

explanation: A SART operates by reflecting radar signals from search and rescue vessels. Because it is a line-of-sight device, keeping it as high as possible above the sea surface significantly increases its detection range by radar scanners.
